##NAMES=Julgoldite-(Fe2+)
##RRUFFID=R070725
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_Fe^2+^Fe^3+^_2_(Si_2_O_7_)(SiO_4_)(OH)_2_·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Khandivali Quarry (Kandivali Quarry),  Mumbai District (Bombay District),  Maharashtra,  India
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Clusters of black blades associated with pale green bladed prehnite and quartz
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070725
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_2.00_(Fe^2+^_0.86_Mg_0.14_)(Fe^3+^_1.67_Al_0.33_)(Si_2.00_O_7_)(Si_1.00_O_4_)(OH)_2_·H_2_O ; OH by charge balance = light  Ca_2.00_(Fe^2+^_0.82_Mg_0.18_)(Fe^3+^_1.44_Al_0.58_)(Si_2.00_O_7_)(Si_1.00_O_4_)(OH)_2_·H_2_O = darker
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, mixed with quartz
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.912 b: 6.0661 c: 19.38 alpha: 90 beta: 97.586 gamma: 90 volume: 1038.5 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
